bird.name: 文须雀
bird.summary: 文须雀（学名：Panurus biarmicus）为鶲科文须雀属的鸟类。分布于英格兰、法国、比利时、荷兰、丹麦、德国、瑞士、西班牙、意大利、波兰、匈牙利、土耳其、伊朗、前苏联、摩洛哥以及中国大陆的新疆、青海、甘肃、内蒙古、东北、河北等地，一般生活于在水边杨、柳树的枝叶间和芦苇的…

locations.name: 基輔
locations.summary: 基輔（烏克蘭語：Київ，羅馬化：Kyiv，發音：[ˈkɪjiu̯] ）是乌克兰首都及人口最多的城市，位于该国中北部，第聂伯河中游的两岸。2021年時人口為296萬，为欧洲人口第七多的城市。其為烏克蘭重要的工業、科學、教育及文化中心，也是…

locations.name: 诺福克郡
locations.summary: 諾福克郡（英語：Norfolk，又譯罗福郡），英國英格蘭東部的郡。以人口計算，金斯林-西諾福克是第1大自治市鎮（Borough），諾里奇是第1大城市、第2大自治市鎮（亦是郡治），大雅茅斯是第1大鎮（Town），金斯林是第2大鎮。 諾福克實…

locations.name: 卡尔·林奈
locations.summary: 卡尔·冯·林奈（瑞典語：Carl von Linné；1707年5月23日—1778年1月10日），也譯為林内、林耐，原名卡尔·林奈乌斯（Carl Linnaeus），瑞典生物学家，瑞典科学院创始人兼第一任主席。林奈奠定了现代生物学命名法…

locations.name: 自然系统第十版
locations.summary: 《自然系统》第十版（英語：10th edition of Systema Naturae）是18世纪瑞典生物学家卡尔·林奈所撰写的生物学专著，于1758年和1759年分别出版上下两卷。林奈在书中为动物定义了二名法命名法则（此前他曾在175…

locations.name: 歐亞大陸
locations.summary: 亚欧大陆或欧亚大陆，西方国家称为欧罗细亚（英語：Eurasia），是亚细亚洲和欧罗巴洲的合稱，也可以视为亚欧非大陆的一个部分。面积5475.9万平方公里。 亚、欧二洲单从地理学和地质学方面考虑并非两个独立的大陆，应属同一个地球表面面积最大…

locations.name: 满洲 (地名)
locations.summary: 滿洲（滿語：ᠮᠠᠨᠵᡠᡤᡠᡵᡠᠨ，羅馬化：Manju Gurun；英語：Manchuria）是東北亞歷史地區，狹義上相當於中国东北地区（即中國的东北三省，亦可包括内蒙古自治區的东四盟市）。广义上则包括曾由中國統治但現屬俄羅斯的外東北（即外…

relations.subject: 文须雀
relations.evidence: The bearded reedling (Panurus biarmicus) is a small, long-tailed passerine bird found in reed beds near water in the temperate zone of Eurasia

relations.subject: 文须雀
relations.evidence: thumb|left|Flock in the species' typical reed bed habitat during winter in Finland, the northernmost part of its distribution thumb|left|Juvenile male perched and moving around in reed beds in the Netherlands The bearded reedling is native to temperate Europe and Asia, ranging from Spain, France and the British Isles to the Manchurian region, but its distribution tends to be quite spotty because of its habitat preference. Maps often show most of its Asian range as a single large continuous section (instead of more spotty), but this is due to limited details in monitoring data from this area relative to the western part of its range.{{cite web| last=Malzer | first=I

relations.subject: 文须雀
relations.evidence: A case study from western Poland | journal=Annales Zoologici Fennici | volume=44 | issue=1 | pages=35–42 | doi=10.2478/orhu-2023-0001 | doi-access=free }} Both adults and young may make eruptive dispersals outside the breeding season and in periods with limited food or cold weather bearded reedlings may perform other, most often local movements. The bearded reedling is a habitat specialist found in reed beds, primarily those with common reed, by fresh or brackish water lakes, swamps or rivers, but it also occurs in nearby tall grass-like vegetation such as bulrushes and true sedges. Especially during the breeding period the species quite strongly avoids non-floodable or dry parts of wetlands,{{cite journal| last1=Alambiaga | first1=I
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

relations.subject: 文须雀
relations.evidence: A case study from western Poland | journal=Annales Zoologici Fennici | volume=44 | issue=1 | pages=35–42 | doi=10.2478/orhu-2023-0001 | doi-access=free }} Both adults and young may make eruptive dispersals outside the breeding season and in periods with limited food or cold weather bearded reedlings may perform other, most often local movements. The bearded reedling is a habitat specialist found in reed beds, primarily those with common reed, by fresh or brackish water lakes, swamps or rivers, but it also occurs in nearby tall grass-like vegetation such as bulrushes and true sedges. Especially during the breeding period the species quite strongly avoids non-floodable or dry parts of wetlands,{{cite journal| last1=Alambiaga | first1=I
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: 文须雀
relations.evidence: | year=2021 | title=Population trends and habitat selection of threatened marsh passerines in a protected Mediterranean wetland | journal=Avian Conservation and Ecology | volume=16 | issue=2 | page=23 | doi=10.5751/ACE-01953-160223 | doi-access=free }} but in other times it may wander more freely. Although typically found perched or climbing on reeds and similar types of vegetation, it readily hops on the ground, especially in swampy places or at water's edge. It has a wide altitudinal range, mostly being found from sea level to medium altitudes, but has been recorded up to above sea level in China
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。
